rows.label: qev041311_MSG0001
rows.name:
No matter how many cards I buy, the Gold
Nopohippo Card just doesn't come out-yone.
I wonder if it really exists?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041311_MSG0002
rows.name: Another miss! It feels super bad-yone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041311_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hey, do you happen to have the
Silver Folium Card I'm looking
for? As for a card I can trade...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041311_MSG0005
rows.name:
If that's the case, I'll give you a Present For You
with the Ma-non Hunting Kit I recently invented, so
won't you give me the card? You don't have it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041311_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yahoo! This charm that makes you
unconsciously want to be eaten!
Foliums really are the best-yone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041311_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Yes! Well then, a Present
For You with the Ma-non Hunting
Kit as a hunting companion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041311_MSG0012
rows.name:
It's a super convenient Capsica
invention! I'd be happy if it
comes in handy for something-yo![ST:wait ]
